testcase.name: shouldReturn200ForAdminRole

create table public.roles ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, name varchar(50) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_roles_name unique (name) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table public.tenants ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, schema_name varchar(50) not null, name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_tenants_schema_name unique (schema_name) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create index idx_tenants_schema_name on public.tenants (schema_name) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table lead_status_history ( changed_at timestamp(6) not null, changed_by uuid, id uuid not null, lead_id uuid not null, status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table leads ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, phone varchar(20), status varchar(30) not null check (status in ('NEW','CONTACTED','QUALIFIED','CLOSED')), email varchar(150) not null, name varchar(150) not null, primary key (id), constraint uk_leads_email_user unique (email, user_id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table login_audit ( success boolean not null, suspicious boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, user_id uuid, ip_address varchar(45), email varchar(320) not null, user_agent varchar(512), failure_reason varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table logs ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid, action TEXT not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table password_reset_token ( used boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, token_hash varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table refresh_tokens ( revoked boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, device_fingerprint varchar(255) not null, token_hash varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_refresh_token_hash unique (token_hash) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table security_audit_logs ( success boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, action varchar(50) not null check (action in ('LOGIN_SUCCESS','LOGIN_FAILED','ACCOUNT_LOCKED','PASSWORD_RESET_REQUESTED','PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESS','USER_REGISTERED')), correlation_id varchar(100), ip_address varchar(100), tenant varchar(100) not null, email varchar(150) not null, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table settings ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, whatsapp varchar(15) not null, id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, company_name varchar(100), vendor_name varchar(100) not null, logo TEXT, welcome_message TEXT, primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table user_sessions ( active boolean not null, suspicious boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, last_access_at timestamp(6) with time zone, revoked_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, user_id uuid not null, token_id varchar(36) not null unique, initial_ip_address varchar(45), ip_address varchar(45), initial_user_agent varchar(512), user_agent varchar(512), primary key (id) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL - create table users ( failed_attempts integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, credentials_updated_at timestamp(6), deleted_at timestamp(6), lock_until timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6) not null, id uuid not null, role_id uuid not null, email varchar(150) not null, name varchar(150) not null, password varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), constraint uq_users_email unique (email) ) 2026-03-02 13:09:38 [main] DEBUG [] [ ] [] org.hibernate.SQL -
